title: Cutmark
description: Make Your Tools Feel More Dangerous with New 3D Models!
body:
## Cutmark

This resource pack brings 3D tools and weapons to your game, giving it a more dangerous look. Whether you're building a home or fighting off mobs, your tools will now look as powerful as they feel.


![Cutmark Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/917d32c49d76fe79391a24f031831d48c509475d_0.webp)


<details>
<summary>Included Tools:</summary>

1. **Wooden** Axe, Hoe, Pickaxe, Shovel, Spear, Sword

2. **Stone** Axe, Hoe, Pickaxe, Shovel, Spear, Sword

3. **Copper** Axe, Hoe, Pickaxe, Shovel, Spear, Sword

4. **Golden** Axe, Hoe, Pickaxe, Shovel, Spear, Sword

5. **Iron** Axe, Hoe, Pickaxe, Shovel, Spear, Sword

6. **Diamond** Axe, Hoe, Pickaxe, Shovel, Spear, Sword

7. **Netherite** Axe, Hoe, Pickaxe, Shovel, Spear, Sword

8. Mace

</details>

# How it works

Replaces InHand 3D models without changing the 2D inventory textures

Works on Minecraft Java v1.21.11+

**No mods required**

#

Всем хайп 🤙
